title: elaphoglossum boryanum
intro: Elaphoglossum boryanum, also known as Bory's Elaphoglossum or Bory's Hair Fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum boryanum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and protect against oxidative stress. Elaphoglossum boryanum is often prepared as an herbal tea or used in infusions, and its leaves can also be dried and powdered for use in capsules or other supplements.
